subcodes.first_line: The Book of God speaketh with truth and summoneth mankind unto His mighty and glorious Path. Verily it hath descended from the heaven of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق و یدع الناس الی صراطه العزیز الحمید انه نزل من سماء البیان
